content.en:
Refining the Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal Substance?

The god of the old world is desperate, how can he do this!

If I could, I wouldn't have come to ask for help!

When he learned that even the top power, the Galaxy Tower, couldn't solve this problem, he was even more desperate.

"Blood Yu Realm God, Star River Tower has a high-level existence of the Eternal Realm God Realm, can't even such a powerhouse solve it?" asked the Old Sun Realm God.

"It may be able to be solved, but how can such an existence save a realm god like you?" the Blood Yu Realm God questioned.

The gods of the old world were speechless.

Indeed, why should people save him, even if it is the realm god of the Star River Tower, if the price to pay for treatment is too great, it is impossible to save it, let alone the eternal realm god realm of other forces!

"God of the Old Sun Realm, you go, I still need healing!"

The Blood Yu Realm God drove away.

He was already polite to be able to say so much to the gods of the old Sun Realm, but he didn't have time to continue talking nonsense with the gods of the old Sun Realm.

If the Old 26th Sun Realm God had not been injured like this, and there was still a glimmer of hope in the future to become a middle-level powerhouse in the Eternal Realm God Realm, then he would value the Old Sun Realm God a little more.

But now, the god of the old Sun Realm is considered to be useless, and there is no need for him to care about the god of the old Sun Realm.

In this way, the gods of the old world were driven out.

......

"Am I really hopeless?"

The gods of the old world muttered to themselves, and their hearts were extremely desperate.

Soon, he was back on Old Mountain.

However, no matter how much he tried to save himself, it was useless.

And soon, the news spread, and many middle forces knew that something had happened to the gods in the old realm, or it would not be too long before the Eternal Dao Seed would become a demon seed, or they would destroy the Eternal Dao Seed themselves.

In either case, it means that the old mountain will completely decline.

When the time comes, the strength of the old mountain will plummet.

So, at this time, there were already medium-sized forces eyeing the old mountains and wanted to occupy the treasures and industries of the old mountains.

After all, if you don't have enough strength, it's naturally impossible to occupy so many resources.

And Ye Tian, who was in the Holy Kingdom of the Human Race, naturally heard about the gods of the Old Sun Mountain and the Old Sun Realm.

"There is a problem with the eternal Dao seed of the god of the old Sun Realm, and he is about to turn into a demon seed?"

Ye Tian was a little interested in this.

Of course, he was interested in the Eternal Devouring Demon Crystal material inside the Eternal Dao Seed of the Old Sun Realm God, and after learning about this matter, he went to investigate, and then he learned that the use of the Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal Material can greatly refine the Eternal Dao Seed, but it will also make the Eternal Dao Seed quickly demonized, and it is difficult to repair the injury.

Once the Eternal Dao seed is injured by this substance, it is almost equivalent to being wasted.

"I didn't expect there to be this substance!"

Ye Tian was very interested.

If he was able to obtain a large amount of Xuandevouring Demon Crystals, wouldn't he be able to quickly improve the Eternal Dao Seed?

He didn't worry about condensing the Eternal Dao Soul at all now, but he was very slow to ascend the Eternal Dao Seed, even if there were so many Eternal Demon Pillars, Chilin Ancient Spears and other treasures to help refine the Eternal Dao Seed, but if he wanted to refine to the current limit of the Eternal Dao Seed, he couldn't do it without hundreds of billions of Dao Era years.

However, if there is enough Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance, then the cultivation time can be greatly reduced.

......

Another period of time has passed.

The god of the old world is becoming more and more manic, and he exudes the rotten aura of the demon seed all over his body, and he is getting closer and closer to the demon seed.

At this time, the other realm gods of the Old Sun Mountain were a little worried.

The Bounded God persuaded, "Old Leader, you better destroy the Eternal Dao Seed!"

"I'm not reconciled!"

Said the god of the old day.

Once he destroys the Eternal Dao Seed, then he will quickly fall to the level of an ordinary Eternal Dao Realm, and he will have no status in the Old Sun Realm God.

Although he is said to be the leader, many of the Eternal Dao Realm gods of the Old Sun Realm are probably unhappy with him, and they may secretly attack him.

At that time, will there still be a realm god to protect him?

If he has a powerful son, then there is no need to worry, but he has no great heirs!

Therefore, if he destroys the Eternal Dao Seed by himself, it is tantamount to committing suicide.

......

Gradually, the gods of the old Sun Realm are getting closer and closer to demonization.

At this time, once he becomes a demon seed, there will inevitably be a powerful realm god who will attack him and kill him.

At this time.

Many of the powerhouses of the Old Sun Mountain have left, for fear of being killed by the gods and demons of the Old Sun Realm.

this day.

The god of the old realm can no longer control his eternal Dao seed, and his eternal Dao seed has been completely transformed into a demon seed by the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance, and he has begun to transform his body, and once his body is transformed, it will completely become a demon seed.

The process was short and beyond his control.

"No!"

The Old Sun Realm God showed despair, he couldn't control himself anymore, and at this time, there was no way to destroy the Eternal Dao Seed by himself.

Suddenly.

A figure appeared, and it was Ye Tian.

"Broken!"

Ye Tian's right hand shook the void and directly pinched the eternal Dao seed of the god of the old Sun Realm.

Immediately afterwards, the Eternal Dao Seed of the Old Sun Realm God was grabbed by Ye Tian and taken out directly, and the body of the Old Sun Realm God was penetrated, but he did not die, but was slowly healing.

However, the cultivation of the gods of the old Sun Realm was rapidly decreasing, their strength was constantly decreasing, and their physical bodies were getting weaker and weaker.

It didn't take long for the Old Sun Realm God to have turned into an ordinary Eternal Realm God Realm, and his body was extremely weak, so his combat power was naturally very low. 807

"God of the Old Sun Realm, don't thank me!"

Ye Tian smiled and looked at the Old Sun Realm God.

The god of the old Sun Realm naturally would not thank Ye Tian, he was taken away from the Eternal Dao Seed, and now that his cultivation has fallen, there will be too much trouble in the future.

He was just very puzzled, why did Ye Tian appear here and take his Eternal Dao Seed in time?

However, Ye Tian did not explain and left directly.

Soon.

The other realm gods of the Old Sun Mountain have returned, after all, the old world gods have not been demonized, so they are afraid.

Seeing the other realm gods, the old realm gods thought that they were the leaders of the old days, so they said to themselves: "I will retreat for a period of time, and I will not see any guests during this time. "

However.

A realm god said: "Old Realm God, no, Old Dao Lord, you are no longer a realm god, and you are not qualified to stay in the headquarters of the Old Day Mountain, just find a place to cultivate under the Old Day Mountain." "

"Gengawa Realm Divine !!!"

The Old Sun Realm God said angrily.

"Old Sun Realm God, our Old Sun Mountain is respected for strength, you are just an ordinary Eternal Realm God Realm now, is it possible that you still want to enjoy the best cultivation conditions here?"

The Old Realm God looked at the other Realm Gods, but the other Realm Gods didn't say anything.

Subsequently, the gods of the Old Sun Realm were driven out of the Old Sun Mountain headquarters.
